This is helpful for displaying statistics for the last 15 minutes, 240 minutes (4 hours), and 480 minutes (8 hours) to see trends. * @param \DateTime $startDate Only calculate statistics from this date and time and later, specified in [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) format. * @param \DateTime $endDate Only include usage that occurred on or before this date, specified in GMT as an [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) date-time. * @param string $taskChannel Only calculate statistics on this TaskChannel.
